improvement: Added a fail-closed exact-repository, exact-commit dispatch decision builder that converts a verified environment-preflight verdict into a bounded production workflow dispatch target.

verification.route: isolated Node.js test runtime using byte-identical source and test files before commit

claim_boundary: This proves deterministic dispatch-decision behavior only. It does not prove credential installation, Cloudflare authorization, workflow execution, deployment, hostname resolution, served identity, or scientific truth.
privacy: No credential values, private chat, health material, diagnosis, or treatment claims were read or committed.
